feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Offline Dashboarding
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Does anyone know if there is a way to display and work with a story offline?

The story would normally have a live data connection, but we have a requirement that users would need to use it in certain situations when there's no internet connection possibility.

Thank you.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: How to integrate Workforce analytics in SAP SAC
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Can any one guide us to create a connection from Success factor workforce analytics to SAP Analytics Cloud.
we would required to know the configurations in Success factor to enable workforce analytics.

Expecting a quick support.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: TabStrip in Popup does not work in different pages of the SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have Story Popup created with TabStrip and several tabs. I want to use them among different pages created in the SAC Story but it says that TabStrip can not be used as is on different page.

Popup_4.open();
TabStrip_2.setSelectedKey("Tab_4");

See attached the error message.

I have to copy the PopUp in all Canvas pages in order to work, is that a way to avoid so many tables to be duplicated?

entry.title: Remove and add Measure in a button
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am working on a project involving a budget plan with 4 measures (measure 1, 2, 3, and 4). After the user completes the planning, they need to compare measure 4 across a different dimension. Imagine this dimension has 3 variables, and measure 4 will appear for each of these 3 variables. I want to create a button script that hides measures 1, 2, and 3, leaving only measure 4 visible for comparison across the dimension. Then, when the user clicks the button again, measures 1, 2, and 3 should reappear.

Thanks in Advance,
GAnjos

entry.title: BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order at item but on SO print should reflect?
entry.content:
Hi, 

is Anyone can help me to sort my client requirement?

My Client is using SAP Public Cloud and they required the below.

They need BOM material should not reflect on Sales Order item level, but it should come on Sales Order print form and also production will be done for the material.

Thanks and regards

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: Deployment of ML Models in SAP AC
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

Just wanted to know that can we deploy our own ML Python based models for advanced analytics for reporting without S4/Hana or Datasphere. Currently using Sap Analytics Cloud with BW and nothing else. 

 

Thanks

SAP Analytics Cloud Machine Learning

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud data label total missing
entry.content:
Hi 

(Regarding Optimized story on live connection to BW 7.5)

On left picture Totals are not shown. Removing the checkmark as shown in Styling, return the totals in second printscreen. However, then the detailed labels are overlapping.

Do anyone know, how I can show totals only on the first printscreen in the 2 blue boxes? In other words, this 'Avoid Data Label Overlap' should not remove the total. Is there a way?

thx

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Advanced Formula "LINK" is not working
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I duplicated a planning model and now want to transfer the values from the productive model to the backup model using a Data Action with the LINK function. However, it's not copying any values. What could I be overlooking?

DATA() = LINK([PlanModel] , [d/Version]="public.Forecast", [d/Measures]="Amount")

 Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Error while importing data in SAC model via excel file
entry.content:
Hello SAC experts,

I am relevantly new to SAC and need help.

I created a blank model in SAC and created dimensions and measures. I am trying to import data using excel file into my data model. I run all the steps but getting the error (please see attached screenshots). Apparently it is a warning but no error but I don't see any data and it says 0 rows imported.

Screenshots are attached .

Your help will be appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Chart data label auto change color disabled in design theme
entry.content:
Hi,

I am new to SAC and I unfortunately disabled the auto color change of data labels when I selected a color for my data labels in my design theme. Back then I did not know that I would disable that function that way. Of course I have now the problem that in some charts the data labels are not readable as the background color is sometimes bright and sometimes dark. And for some unknown reason SAC does not allow you to change the color of different data labels to different colors in the same chart.

Does anybody know how i can revert the selected color in the design theme so that the auto color function works again? Normally there is a reset button to reset the color changes. However this button does not exist in the design theme. I really do not want to start my design theme from the beginning as I have already made so many changes to it.

I hope someone can help me.

entry.title: max users in a team
entry.content:
For a team, is there a max number of users that can be assigned to it?

We have a team that we need to assign all users too, once all assigned it initially looks good but then when going back into the teams section it removes people till there is only 180 left. I wonder if this is a limit but can not see any documentation to confirm this.

entry.title: SA Data action performance
entry.content:
Hello,
I have a data action that multiplies the percentages for each month by an amount, and this way I distribute each month according to the applicable percentage. The problem is that the data action takes 8-10 minutes. I think the issue is in the foreach, but I can't see how to fix it.

 

Thanks

entry.title: planning distribution on hierarchy date dimension
entry.content:
Hi all,

we use demand planning on monthly basis in SAP Analytics Cloud for planning. Whenever we input aggregated quantities on yearly basis, the values get distributed onto months (as it should be).

Problem here is the creation of decimal values (e.g. 1000 per year equals 83.33 per month). This does not make sense for the purpose of our planning and we only want to plan in integers

Currently the key figure is configurated as decimal number with 7 digits. Since the values are already existing, we can not change the key figure properties.

Is there a way to configure the the distribution in the hierarchical structure to only input integers?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Memory and CPU Consumption in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: In SAP Analytics Cloud, how can I access Memory and CPU consumption of Stories, Dashboards, and Data Actions when user executes?

entry.title: SAC Commentary time
entry.content:
Hello All

We have used commentary solution in a SAC table where users use the time filter to change month & provide comment for the selected month.

 

I have now a requriement to show the latest commented date for every month.

 

Any thoughts/ideas on the solution.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud #Comment #SAC

entry.title: Dimension Hierarchy Dropdown total
entry.content: I have a dimension ( Called "Fonte de financiamento", whitch has 3 "children" "RP", "RG", and "OE", than it has the other children of this 3 things) in a row on DropDown level 1 showing all totals ( I selected on Show/Hide of the dimesion ), but when i select level 2 dropdown, the totals dissapears. When i use drop down on one of those 3, it continues to appear, but when i select 2, the totals do the same and dissapear. What is the problem, and how can i fix it?

entry.title: How to transport a Data Model conversion to New Model Type
entry.content:
Dear SAP Analytics Cloud community,

Currently we are looking into the conversion of Classic Account Models to the New Model Type and are curious to read over some experiences and see whether there are any solutions for our challenges.

We have been using SAP Analytics Cloud from the very beginning and Data Models were initially created as the Classic Account Model. With regard to the future and the desire to use new capabilities of the New Model Type we would like to convert our models. Our landscape consists out of separate development, acceptance and production systems. Ideally, we would like to prepare the conversion in our development system as a change and transport it throughout the landscape.

Is there any documentation on best practices for the conversion of Data Models?

Using our transport system would mean that we lose production data in the migrated model after importing the change. Performing the conversion in the production system would mean more risks and downtime of reports and other background processes such as loading and transforming data with Multi/Data Actions.

We are curious about your experience.

entry.title: Datasphere & SAC - Decimal places in Export
entry.content:
Hello,

when i export a table to excel it gives me for some calculation many decimal places even though i set it to 2 decimal places.

For example

Data coming from  Datasphere via live data connection.

Is there any possibility to format this to 2 decimal palces?

 

Kr

entry.title: How to generate a value for a specific selection of a cell in a table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can some one help me to find a way to filter the dimensions by selecting a cell in the table, considering the below example we have two models. Model 1 and Model 2 , there are two tables in a story on selection of model 1 table  we should fetch that specific combination and a pop up should appear for the selection of scenario dimension which is specifically present in model 2 ,After selecting the scenario , value 1 should generate for the selections.

       
MODEL 1    Amount 
 AccountCost CenterProfit CenterProduct  
 KPI1CC1PC1P1  
 KPI2CC2PC2P2  
       
       
       
       
MODEL 2     Amount
 Accountcost centerprofit centerproductScenario 
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S11
 KPI1CC1PC1P1S21

entry.title: Move data only to first product in the hierarchy below using data action in SAC
entry.content:
I have a Product dimension which has 2 hierarchies, PL6 and PL7. The hierarchy is something like this. I want to move the data from hierarchy PL6 level to PL7 but only to the first product in PL7 hierarchy. I'm trying to do it with the below code using FOREACH. It is moving the data to all the products in the PL7. [p/SKUPL6] is the attribute which has the connection between PL7 AND PL6 hierarchies. Each product at PL7 level has this attribute SKUPL6 which has the value for PL6 under which it belongs to. I'm trying to use FOREACH to move data from PL6 for each iteration to PL7 and then delete the product if SKUPL6 = null.. As SKUPL6 only has values for PL7 products and for PL6 products this attribute is blank. The below code is copying data for all products below PL6 but not deleting PL6 value within the FOREACH. I'm trying to delete the PL6 value so it only copies the value for the first product and for the next product it will have no value in PL6 to copy below.

How can I achieve this?
